name: The Ceaseless
descriptionSeed: The pure pole: making that cannot stop to ask whether it should. The Ceaseless build continuously, over each other, over the ground, over anything that is there — and they are joyous and they will not stop and the making has begun to include things that were not asked.
encounterFlavor: The Ceaseless, who are making and making and cannot hear you; structures growing over a road, a farm, a person; the awful beauty of it.
questSeeds: The Ceaseless are building toward a settlement and will not stop and are not hostile
Something the Ceaseless built is ALIVE and is also building
